description: Composition Cream floral print pleated kurta made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves with gathered cuffs that have sheer ribbon detailing, high cut rounded neckline that has sheer ribbon detailing and extends into a chest placket, pleats flowing from the shoulders and slit side hems Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron This piece of art by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and pumps for a casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurta Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
